title: Identity and adaptation
subtitle: Talk about change without losing selfhood.
overview: Use language for continuity and transformation.

Module: Culture, Ethics, Society. C1 Med develops sustained independent argument, sophisticated source synthesis, editorial revision, professional authority, complex social reasoning, and controlled advanced output.

sections.title: C1 Med focus
rows: Use language for continuity and transformation.
使用连续性和转变的表达。
The question is not only personal; it is also social and institutional.
这个问题不只是个人层面的，也是社会和制度层面的。
Describe how someone can change and remain themselves.
描述一个人如何改变，同时仍然保持自我。
Adapting to a new culture does not require losing one identity; it requires learning which parts need translation.
适应新文化不要求失去一种身份，而是要学会哪些部分需要转换表达。

items.en: Use language for continuity and transformation.
items.zh: 使用连续性和转变的表达。

items.en: The question is not only personal; it is also social and institutional.
items.zh: 这个问题不只是个人层面的，也是社会和制度层面的。

items.en: Adapting to a new culture does not require losing one identity; it requires learning which parts need translation.
items.zh: 适应新文化不要求失去一种身份，而是要学会哪些部分需要转换表达。

items.en: I will make the reasoning explicit instead of relying on impressive vocabulary.
items.zh: 我会把推理说清楚，而不是依赖华丽词汇。

items.en: A C1 Med answer should sustain a line of thought across several connected moves.
items.zh: C1 Med 回答应该能通过几个相连动作维持一条思路。

items.en: If the idea becomes dense, I will slow down and give the listener a clear route.
items.zh: 如果想法变得密集，我会放慢，并给听者一条清楚路线。

items.en: I can revise for argument, evidence, rhythm, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以从论证、证据、节奏和个人声音上修改。

items.en: This lesson is finished only when I can use the move in an unfamiliar topic.
items.zh: 只有当我能在陌生话题中使用这个动作时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Describe how someone can change and remain themselves.
lines.zh: 描述一个人如何改变，同时仍然保持自我。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Adapting to a new culture does not require losing one identity; it requires learning which parts need translation.
lines.zh: 适应新文化不要求失去一种身份，而是要学会哪些部分需要转换表达。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the argument more sustained and more independent?
lines.zh: 你能让这个论证更持续、更独立吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will connect the claim, evidence, limitation, and implication without losing the thread.
lines.zh: 可以。我会把观点、证据、局限和影响连起来，同时不丢主线。

items.en: Describe how someone can change and remain themselves.
items.zh: 描述一个人如何改变，同时仍然保持自我。

items.en: Answer once in ten to twelve sentences with a sustained line of thought.
items.zh: 用十到十二个句子回答一次，保持一条持续的思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Med move: evaluate evidence, compare assumptions, refine a concept, or revise the tone.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Med 动作：评价证据、比较假设、细化概念或调整语气。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite one section for clarity and one section for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后为清晰度重写一部分，为风格重写一部分。

items.en: Keep the final version as a model for C1 Hi practice.
items.zh: 把最终版本保留下来，作为 C1 Hi 练习的模板。
